en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid SCC Petrochemistry certificate in the Mainland Europe - Contractor Safety Certification questionnaire.

Company Level Certification: Only certificates issued to the legal business entity are acceptable. Individual employee certifications do not meet the requirement for organizational compliance.

Identification of the Certified Entity:
The certificate must clearly display the registered company name and, where applicable, the registration number associated with the certified entity.

Owner-Operators / Sole Proprietors:
In cases where a supplier operates under their own name as the legal business entity, the certificate may display the individual’s name, provided that the individual is the certified entity according to the issuing body.
Upload a copy of the certificate:
The standard validity period is between 1-3 years.\n\nSCC Certificate
